title: astragalus rhizocephalus subsp. rhizocephalus
intro: Astragalus rhizocephalus subsp. rhizocephalus, also known as the desert milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to the deserts of North America, known for its adaptogenic and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its ability to promote immune function, reduce stress, and enhance overall health and well-being, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. Astragalus rhizocephalus subsp. rhizocephalus is typically prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support the body's natural defenses and improve vitality.
